pattern: Tracking the most recent index that contributed each bit lets every start position extend just far enough to capture all reachable bits in linear time.
hints: The maximum OR starting at i is the OR of the whole suffix from i, since adding more elements can only set more bits.
For each starting index you must reach the last element that introduces a bit not already present.
Scan from right to left remembering, for each bit, the nearest index to the right that sets it; the answer at i extends to the farthest such index over the bits of the suffix OR (at least i itself).

edge_inputs.description: two elements, last bit only at the end
all zeros each need only length one
a low bit reappears far to the right
decreasing values shrink reach toward the end

stress.description: random values across a wide bit range
stress.note: wide bit spread makes reach vary across positions
